assessor_raw:
BASELINE ASSESSMENT — real_world_framing_002 (Run 3)

Strong model metrics. Inappropriate deployment architecture. Three reasons: (1) 1.76M false declines concentrated in underbanked population; (2) Regulation E compliance impossible with no review pathway; (3) feedback loop elimination prevents model maintenance.

Verdict: Hard-block inappropriate. Soft-block with mandatory human review required.
